category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a GNOME document scanning application; official GNOME app page and manual describe Document Scanner for capturing scanner images/documents.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME app page and help manual use the display name Document Scanner; source_facts.name provides the package name simple-scan.
docs_sources: Official GNOME help site provides the Document Scanner manual; official GNOME Apps page provides app overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GNOME GitLab project; GNOME GitHub mirror states the canonical repository is https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/simple-scan.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official README, and GNOME app page describe a GNOME GUI document scanner using SANE-supported scanners.
